name: lifelongpep-mcp
description: Planned MCP tools for GLP-1 readiness, metabolic longevity consult preparation, and doctor booking handoff in India.

tools.name: lifelongpep.get_capabilities
tools.description: Return current lifelongpep status, guardrails, live actions, and planned interfaces.

tools.name: lifelongpep.get_readiness_checklist
tools.description: Return non-medical GLP-1 readiness questions a user can prepare before a doctor consult.

tools.name: lifelongpep.prepare_consult
tools.description: Collect a structured intake summary for a future metabolic longevity or GLP-1 readiness consult.

tools.name: lifelongpep.request_doctor_consult
tools.description: Request doctor consultation options after booking workflows are live.

tools.name: lifelongpep.get_request_status
tools.description: Check the status of a submitted agent intake or consult request after launch.

guardrails: The MCP server is not live today.
No medical advice, diagnosis, prescription, fulfillment, payment, or live booking is available today.
Agents must disclose that lifelongpep is pre-launch and waitlist-only.
Doctors decide independently after launch. GLP-1 access is not guaranteed.
